title: scrophularia cretacea
intro: Scrophularia cretacea, also known as Crete figwort, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Scrophularia cretacea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and alleviating symptoms of coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
